info.title: The Feersum Scheme Compiler
info.description:
This package contains the main compiler entry point for the Feersum Scheme compiler. Compile Scheme to a .NET Assembly!

      
    Feersum Scheme is a Scheme implementation that compiles to .NET. Feersum provides a command line tool for batch compliation, a Scheme REPL, and a .NET SDK for MSBuild support.

options.name: --version
options.description: Print the program version and exit.

options.name: --assemblyversion
options.description: Specify the version for the generated assembly.

options.name: --output
options.description: The output path to write compilation results to.
